parameters.content:
CourseLens Orchestrator v1

Purpose:
Rule-routed total-control workflow for CourseLens.

Scope:
- Receives user request plus already-extracted text inputs.
- Builds a deterministic routing plan.
- Dynamically calls the four upstream extraction/profile agents.
- Sends available outputs to Evidence Fusion Agent.
- Sends fusion result and user demand to Review Strategy / Critic Agent.

Boundary:
The orchestrator does not generate final review advice directly and does not parse raw PDF/PPT/audio files.

nodes.name: HTTP - Call Review Strategy Critic Agent

main.node: HTTP - Call Review Strategy Critic Agent
